description: Maps each voice dimension to its contributing question items and semantic differential pairs. Gold standard dimensions are the primary output; gap dimensions capture additional voice characteristics. Only self-report scorable items (likert, forced_choice, select, scenario with scoring_map) are included; open_ended, writing_sample, and process_narration items are scored via the NLP pipeline.

formality.description: Degree of formality in writing voice, from highly formal/specialized to casual/accessible

emotional_tone.description: Emotional coloring of writing voice, from warm/emotional to detached/analytical

personality.description: Distinctive personality expressed through writing, from earnest/personal to ironic/impersonal

complexity.description: Structural and linguistic complexity, from minimalist/concise to elaborate/expansive

audience_awareness.description: Degree to which writing voice adapts to and accounts for the intended audience

authority.description: Stance of authority in writing, from collaborative/tentative to assertive/authoritative

narrativity.description: Tendency toward narrative vs. expository modes in writing

humor.description: Use of humor, wit, and playfulness in writing voice

precision.description: Attention to grammatical precision, word choice exactness, and mechanical correctness

revision_orientation.description: Approach to revision and editing in the writing process

contextual_flexibility.description: Ability and willingness to shift voice across different writing contexts

risk_tolerance.description: Willingness to take creative risks and experiment with unconventional voice choices

self_awareness.description: Metacognitive awareness of one's own writing voice and its effects

consistency.description: Consistency of voice across writing sessions and pieces. No self-report items; scored exclusively via NLP pipeline cross-sample variance analysis.

influence_absorption.description: Tendency to absorb and integrate influences from other writers

vocabulary_range.description: Breadth and register range of vocabulary usage

sentence_rhythm.description: Characteristic sentence length patterns and rhythmic variation

genre_awareness.description: Awareness of and adherence to genre-specific voice conventions
